name: web3d-test
description: Web3D 技术测试合集 — 不同 AI 模型生成的 3D 场景对比

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n portal,claude,doubao,gpt-webgpu,gpt-skill,cf5-ocean,gf35-ocean,gpt-ocean,grok-ocean,cf5-kart,gf35-kart,gpt-kart -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green,blue,red,cyanBright,magentaBright,greenBright,blueBright,yellowBright,redBright "vite --port 3000" "vite --port 3001 claudeopus4.8-ocean-webgpu" "vite --port 3002 doubao2.1-ocean-weather" "vite --port 3003 gpt5.5-ocean-webgpu" "vite --port 3004 gpt5.5-ocean-skill" "vite --port 3005 claudefable5-ocean-realistic" "vite --port 3006 geminiflash3.5-ocean-realistic" "vite --port 3007 gpt5.5-ocean-realistic" "vite --port 3008 grok4.3-ocean-realistic" "vite --port 3009 claudefable5-kart-circuit" "vite --port 3010 geminiflash3.5-kart-circuit" "vite --port 3011 gpt5.5-kart-circuit"
